name: react-native-turbo-lnd-example-electrobun
description: Electrobun app with React, Tailwind CSS, and Vite HMR

scripts.start: bun run ensure:napi-addon && vite build && electrobun dev
scripts.dev: bun run ensure:napi-addon && vite build && electrobun dev --watch
scripts.build:canary: bun run ensure:napi-addon && vite build && electrobun build --env=canary
